title: Foundational answer to four questions to most easily teach the shema
author: joshualinog
excerpt: # four questions 1. What is a god / what is God? 2. What is a human?  3. What is heaven?  4. What is earth?
content:
# four questions
1. What is a god / what is God?
2. What is a human? 
3. What is heaven? 
4. What is earth?

## this Arrangement / formulation 
God now can only be known as a spirit.
